video.title: The Season Ends With Fireworks In Como! | Il Lombardia 2022 Highlights

all_candidates.title: The Season Ends With Fireworks In Como! | Il Lombardia 2022 Highlights
“TIME WAITS FOR NO ONE!” ⏳ OTD in 2022: Pogačar claimed his second of three wins at Il Lombardia!
When Tadej Pogacar won his second Giro di Lombardia in 2022 🤩🎞️

transcript.clean_text: the leaves were falling and what is normally anyway a Bittersweet day to follow agility lombardier 2022 promised to be one full of emotion right from the start vincenton Newberry and Alejandro Valverde saying goodbye to the sport after 17 and 21 Seasons respectively the race itself 253 kilometers almost 5 000 meters of climbing beginning in Bergamot Ending by the lake in Cornwall to a sense of San fermo de la battalia sandwiching difficult day in the saddle the final Monument of the 2022 season would end up with 10 Riders up the road Breakaway that went in the first 25 to 30 kilometers nine originally made it had a bit of chasing to do over the top of the first climb of the day he'd get on and the 10 Riders would get about five and a half minutes of a maximum Advantage Cradock the marquisonde were big names unfortunately one of the big retiring names had to do so in the back of an ambulance hurting his collarbone on the way to crashing out not announcing any retirement but still at 39 years of age and in fantastic form he too had another nasty crash bad luck and more of it impossible for a man who's plagued by the stuff on to the races big climb and the start of the finale UAM are at sliding things up Chris Harper the Australian leaving yamovisma but with a man of the match performance so strong for Jonas vienegal who sat in the Peloton put in a great ride as did Rafael mica and UA Emirates were looking strong as they passed the patron saint of Italian cycling and the museum at the top French saint of cycling two-time world champion not quite at his best and with one lap to go 22 kilometers remaining a few Riders have been dropped Riders would head up to Villa A reduced pellet and then taking things on to video a tough steep climb almost five kilometers long I'll have Philippe one of the first victims and then Vincenzo nibali the shot not able to take one final bite swimming off into Lake cormor and retirement small group managed to get away and today pogachar attacked with 19 kilometers remaining and Rick Mass followed miguelanda could but only for a while and the rest having to fight it out for the minor places but it will be pugacha versus Mass towards the top of two Villa Lander was hanging on he could sniff away a Podium Place third already at the general Italia early in the year maybe heading towards his first Monument podium inside the final eight kilometers igita and Rodriguez would go away they could sense an opportunity of a top five Alejandro Alberta in the meantime was hoping to continue a run of 10 years apart from a couple of non-finishes inside the top 10 of every monument ridden his teammate Mass was trying to win the race he'd attacked several times but couldn't distance he was turning up as defending champion Lana was always a danger lurking at about 10 to 15 seconds they come over the final climb with 5Ks to go cha knowing that on paper he was the fastest out of the two end of the final few hundred meters almost six and a half hours of racing and Rick Mass launching the Sprint with 150 meters to go a changed rider in the last few weeks the bat on pass from Valverde to him but as some of the greats said goodbye the Next Generation would take it on today pogachar becoming the only rider ever to win on his first two appearances at the Giro Di lombardier Lander would take a first ever podium in your Monument Mass up there and finishing second ending another great season three monuments written fifth fourth and first not a bad record is it was pogachar from Mass to Landa in fourth Rodriguez Fifth and Don Alejandro balberde Belmonte in sixth place in his final bike race as a pro gacha celebrated the end of 2022 approaching 50 victories already and brick Mass looks like he might be a different Rider next year and landismore still alive going into 2023 top level cycling ends for another season the Giro de lombardier entertains us shark swims off while bird defies his last bullet more to come next season this time from the Next Generation
